title: Rainbow Experience Bar - Animated
body:
**If you want to add more candy look to your gui you are in the right place**
##
![Experience Bar showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6858e1efac154a9c48cdc039724c01078030dd54.jpeg)
This resource pack adds animated rainbow exp bar  
That's all  
**Works in vanilla minecraft**
